items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府出口管制指令再次声明，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的访问权限。相对此前的初始声明，本次进一步明确指令执行范围与合规口径。这是一项区域可用性/合规层面的硬性变化，调用方必须立即在美相关账户中下线对这两个模型的访问。
items.backend_focus: 立即在 API 客户端把 model 字段从 fable-5、mythos-5 切到未被影响的 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 系列；检查所有 IAM/Org 成员是否仍有 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 权限并收回，关注 Anthropic 后续是否进一步扩展受控模型清单。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的受益。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，团队成员如有兴趣可关注招募信息，但与现有 Claude API 集成无任何接口层影响。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展至 15+ 国家约 150 个新组织。这是 AI 安全研究/公益合作扩容公告，不涉及 Claude API 字段、模型版本、限流或区域可用性变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。本文是项目合作范围扩展，调用方工程实现不受影响，模型 endpoint、SDK、context window 等均无变化，无需调整代码或配置。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，主打编码、agent 任务与专业工作能力更强，附带更大的 context window 与改进的工具使用。这是 Opus 系列一次主版本升级，相对 Opus 4.5 在长任务与 agent 工作流上有可量化提升，旧 Opus 模型预计在 deprecation 周期内被替代。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把生产 API 调用中 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8，重点回归长 context、Tool Use 与 agent 多步任务场景；保留 Opus 4.5 作为 fallback，关注 Anthropic 公布的 Opus 4.5 deprecation 时间线以规划下线窗口。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 首尔办公室开业并宣布与韩国 AI 生态新合作，是 APAC 区域市场拓展动作。这是企业区域扩张公告，未直接给出新增 API region、endpoint 或区域限流差异。
items.backend_focus: 短期关注 Anthropic 后续是否在 KR region 开放独立 endpoint 或降低该区域延迟；当前 API 调用 region 字段无变化，无需调整代码，待官方 region 列表更新后再评估是否把流量从 us-east-1 切到新区域。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个 Public Record 结果，是公司透明度与公共记录机制的第一期内容。这是政策/治理信息披露，不涉及任何模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或限流变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。本文是治理与透明度报告，不影响 Claude API、SDK 或模型行为，无需修改任何代码或配置。
